docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY VANG, JENNY AU-VANG, ORIENT R (SON, LIVE-IN CARE-GIVER, AND REPRESENTATIVE) AS TO DEFENDANT TOBENER RAVENSCROFT LLP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-13-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VANG, JENNY AU-VANG, ORIENT R (SON, LIVE-IN CARE-GIVER, AND REPRESENTATIVE) IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TOBENER RAVENSCROFT LLP STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT TOBENER RAVENSCROFT LLP
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL APPROVED*** PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-13-2025 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUN-16-2025 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUN-16-2025 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-16-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-16-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE - PLAINTIFFS JENNY VANG AND ORIENT AU-VANG ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT TOBENER RAVENSCROFT LLP IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JOSEPH TOBENER. PLAINTIFF IS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER REBECCA CHAU. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CARRIE ZEPEDA; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-16-2025 - JUDGMENT.
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO: JENNY VANG & ORIENT R. AU-VANG FOR SERVICE ON: JULIA OANH WOBBE
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO: JENNY VANG & ORIENT R. AU-VANG FOR SERVICE ON: JOSEPH STEPHEN TOBENER
